descriptionShort: Nanaimo Clippers defeat Juan de Fuca 5-2; Richmond Sockeyes lose to Delta Flyers 6-4.
descriptionLong: Game recap covering two BCJHL contests from October 14, 1987. Nanaimo Clippers downed Juan de Fuca 5-2 at Civic Arena behind goalie Mike Sutherland's third win since trade from Vernon, with player notes on Matt Woods and Rob Steele. Richmond Sockeyes fell to Delta Flyers 6-4 in Delta, with Brad Dickson scoring two goals for Richmond; Flyers' Holmes, Biagioni, and MacDonald combined for 12 points to maintain first place.
